news.headline: AGIX token holders can migrate to FET at a 1:0.43335 ratio via OKX starting July 1, 2024. Follow the schedule.
news.summary: Starting July 1, 2024, OKX is facilitating the transfer of AGIX tokens to FET at a 1:0.43335 ratio. Users are encouraged to adhere to the outlined schedule for the migration process.

news.headline: Ex-BoE MPC member projects Bank of England interest rate to reach 3.5% by 2025.
16-year-old daughter of a dissenting writer facing sexual threats in a campaign linked to China's Communist Party.
news.summary: A clandestine operation aimed at silencing a writer who opposes the Communist Party has escalated to include sexually suggestive threats against his teenage daughter, who is 16 years old.

news.headline: Bitcoin typically sees a June dip before a strong July rebound. BTC down 9% in June from $67,700 to $61,400. Expert predicts double-digit gains in July, possibly up to 24%. Shin points to lack of new capital and selling pressure from the German government as factors for BTC's current decline.
news.summary: Crypto expert Laura Shin is anticipating a possible resurgence for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in July, as history shows a typical downturn in June followed by a strong recovery. Analysis reveals that in the past five occurrences, Bitcoin has displayed substantial growth in July after a negative June, with gains exceeding 9.6% and reaching up to 24%. Currently, BTC has declined by nearly 9% this June, dropping from $67,700 to $61,400. Shin attributes Bitcoin’s recent slump to various factors such as limited influx of new funds, selling pressure from the German government, among others. For further details, refer to the complete coverage on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Batteries Plus honored for innovation at 2024 FCXC Conference by advancing AI technologies in the industry.
news.summary: A prominent battery retailer has been acknowledged for its contribution to advancing the adoption of AI technologies in the industry. Batteries Plus, a renowned consumer and business specialty battery franchise based in Hartland, Wisconsin, received recognition during the recent Franchise Customer Experience event held on June 27, 2024. This retailer is recognized globally for its significant role in promoting the use of AI technologies within the field.

news.headline: Majority of US employers to maintain current benefits in 2025 despite rising healthcare costs. - Mercer Study
news.summary: In New York, Mercer, a division of Marsh McLennan (NYSE: MMC) and a renowned figure in transforming the way we work, redefining retirement and investment prospects, and promoting health and well-being, disclosed the findings from its Survey on Health and Benefit Strategies for 2025. The survey highlights that despite a rise in healthcare costs, most employers do not plan to reduce their health benefits. In fact, many intend to improve their programs, although some modifications may be implemented.

news.headline: AllSpice.io launches AllSpice Actions, offering DevOps functionality for electronics design to empower engineers.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in San Francisco, AllSpice.io introduced a new product called AllSpice Actions, aimed at assisting engineers in enhancing their design collaboration process. This hardware development platform is designed to streamline workflow automation for electrical engineering teams. The launch marks a significant milestone for AllSpice.io as they continue to innovate in the field.

news.headline: Ann Tracy of Colgate-Palmolive Co. is appointed as the new Board Chair of UN Global Compact Network USA. Schueller, Leitsch, and Okoroafor also join the Executive Committee. (Total of 4 new appointments mentioned)
news.summary: Three prominent executives, Gayle Schueller from 3M, Jennifer Leitsch from Ernst & Young LLP, and Michael Okoroafor from McCormick & Company, have been appointed to the Executive Committee of the UN Global Compact Network USA (Network USA). This American chapter of the United Nations Global Compact made the announcement in New York on June 27, 2024. The UN Global Compact is a voluntary initiative based on CEO commitments to implement universal sustainability principles and take steps to support UN goals. Gayle Schueller, Jennifer Leitsch, and Michael Okoroafor's roles on the Executive Committee will involve guiding the Network USA in its efforts towards advancing sustainable business practices and contributing to the achievement of key global targets.

news.headline: Bamboo Health CEO Jeff Smith named a top 25 healthcare software exec of 2024 for exceptional leadership.
news.summary: In an announcement from Bamboo Health™, a prominent Real-Time Care Intelligence™ provider, it was revealed that their Chief Executive Officer, Jeff Smith, has been recognized as one of the Top 25 Healthcare Software Executives of 2024 by The Healthcare Technology Report. This recognition showcases Smith's outstanding leadership not only at Bamboo Health but also in his previous roles and emphasizes his talent in establishing valuable partnerships with important stakeholders. The acknowledgment specifically applauds his role in advancing the Smart Signals™ network, the most extensive in its kind, which has significantly impacted the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Debate watch ad criticizes landlord greed.
Gunnar Eberhardt appointed as EVP, UPM Communication Papers & Group Executive Team member on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, UPM-Kymmene Corporation announced changes in its board and management. Gunnar Eberhardt has been named Executive Vice President of UPM Communication Papers and will join the Group Executive Team.

news.headline: Nature's Bounty® introduces "It's In Your Nature" campaign to unite products and connect emotionally with consumers, starting on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Bridgewater, New Jersey - On June 27, 2024, Nature's Bounty® introduced its latest brand campaign "It's In Your Nature" aimed at empowering consumers. The campaign marks a fresh start for the company known for its research-driven vitamin and nutritional supplements strategy. Nature's Bounty® is a prominent player in the health industry, delivering quality products to their customers. This new initiative is set to reach a wide audience, emphasizing the natural essence of individuals and their inherent capabilities. The campaign comes at a significant time for the company as it strives to further impact the lives of its consumers positively.

news.headline: Randy Fox to keynote Emergency Nursing 2024 in Las Vegas, promising transformational journey.
news.summary: Renowned author and acclaimed speaker Randy Fox will lead an inspirational session in Las Vegas, promising attendees a transformative journey towards achieving excellence. The event, taking place on June 27, 2024, in Schaumburg, Illinois, will focus on Emergency Nursing. Fox's unparalleled knowledge and dynamic presentation style are set to captivate the audience, offering a valuable experience. Attendees can look forward to gaining valuable insights and motivation to excel in their field.

news.headline: ACLS advances humanistic scholarship with fellowship & grant programs catering to 21st century scholars, continuing a century-long tradition of scholarly advancement.
news.summary: Focusing on the evolving requirements of 21st-century scholars, fellowship and grant programs are being introduced to uphold a century-old legacy of promoting scholarly advancement in the humanities. In a recent update from New York on June 27, 2024, the American Council of Learned Societies (ACLS) announced these initiatives. This move signifies the commitment to nurturing researchers and academics with timely support, underlining the organization's dedication to fostering intellectual growth.

news.headline: Slickdeals has appointed John Breen as Senior VP for sales and marketing to boost marketplace growth.
news.summary: San Mateo, California – On June 27, 2024, Slickdeals revealed significant changes in its sales and marketing department by appointing John Breen as the new Senior Vice President. Slickdeals is a unique shopping platform that relies on a community of millions of dedicated shoppers who collaborate to find and share online discounts and coupons. This move comes as part of the company's strategy to enhance its sales and marketing operations and bring in fresh perspectives.

news.headline: Nexstim Plc secures a loan from Finnvera for digitalization and innovation project, boosting product development.
Fed's 2024 Stress Test shows major banks face higher potential losses, PPNR down 9% YoY. Market disappointed by results.
news.summary: Major American banks expressed disappointment with the Federal Reserve's 2024 Stress Tests, which aim to evaluate financial institutions' capital strength in dire economic conditions. Results showed that all 31 banks analyzed met minimum capital requirements in a severe crisis. However, projected potential losses for these banks were higher compared to the previous year. Analyst Richard Ramsden from Goldman Sachs highlighted that the Stress Test outcomes were worse than anticipated. This was mainly due to a significant decrease in pre-provision net revenue (PPNR), with the largest banks experiencing a 9% decline year-over-year. Moreover, elevated credit losses and provisions, especially in commercial and industrial loans (C&I) and credit card sectors, contributed to the challenging results. Wells Fargo & Co. (NYSE:WFC), Bank of America, and other major banks were affected by the test outcomes.

news.headline: Win free homestyle favorites with Cracker Barrel's Endless Summer Sweepstakes. Celebrate July Fourth and National Fried Chicken Day with can't-miss deals.
news.summary: In preparation for July Fourth and National Fried Chicken Day, Lebanon-based restaurant chain Cracker Barrel Old Country Store® is offering exciting deals this summer. From June 27, 2024, guests have the opportunity to win free homestyle favorites as part of the promotional event entitled the "Endless Summer." This month is filled with irresistible discounts and giveaways, creating an unmissable experience for customers.

news.headline: Science 37 improves under-enrolling trials, helping in 20 studies with patient recruitment and enrollment.
news.summary: Almost 20 studies have utilized Science 37's medical and operational knowledge to enhance patient recruitment and enrollment efforts.

news.headline: Goldman hires big, marking end to private equity era.
Televerde Foundation received a donation of laptops from PlanITROI to help women reentering society post-incarceration.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Phoenix, the Televerde Foundation, a nonprofit organization with 501(c)(3) status, revealed that they received a substantial donation. The foundation focuses on offering personal and professional growth chances to women affected by incarceration to help them secure fulfilling careers after their release.

news.headline: VanEck seeks approval for Solana ETF in US post successes with Bitcoin & Ethereum; potential big move.
news.summary: VanEck has recently filed for the first-ever Solana exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the United States, following the approvals of Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs. This move indicates a potential significant development in the ETF space, with Solana emerging as the next big player alongside these established cryptocurrencies. If approved, the Solana ETF could attract a significant amount of investor interest, expanding the options available for individuals looking to invest in digital assets. This marks a notable step in the mainstream adoption of Solana, as the cryptocurrency continues to gain traction in the market. The filing by VanEck signifies the growing importance of Solana and its potential to offer new opportunities for investors seeking exposure to alternative digital assets beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum.

news.headline: Medius introduces 2 AI solutions for Accounts Payable efficiency - Medius Copilot for APA and Medius Supplier Conversations.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida on June 27, 2024, Medius introduced two groundbreaking products: Medius Copilot for Accounts Payable Automation (APA) and Medius Supplier Conversations. The company specializes in AI-based solutions for Accounts Payable (AP) automation. This launch marks a significant milestone for Medius in revolutionizing the AP industry with state-of-the-art technology.

news.headline: Post-hoc analysis of Phase 3 REFLECT Trial at ESMO GI 2024 shows LENVIMA® efficacy in uHCC based on tumor response depth.
news.summary: Eisai revealed findings from a recent analysis conducted after the Phase 3 REFLECT trial on June 27, 2024, in Nutley, New Jersey. The analysis focused on assessing the efficacy outcomes related to the depth of response in individuals diagnosed with unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma (uHCC) who were undergoing treatment with LENVIMA®.

news.headline: BE OPEN joins MED9 & UNECE summits on education & sustainability, promoting SDGs. Cyprus hosts the event on June 27-28, 2024.
news.summary: BE OPEN Foundation is set to participate in two significant events in Cyprus on June 27 and 28, 2024. These include the MED9 Ministerial Summit for Education for Sustainable Development and the UNECE Forum on ESD: Empowering Youth for Sustainable Futures. This engagement underscores the Foundation's commitment to promoting sustainable practices in education and empowering youth for a sustainable future.

news.headline: NTSB penalizes Boeing for prematurely revealing details on 737 Max probe, violation of aircraft safety regulations cited.
news.summary: The National Transportation Safety Board has revealed that Boeing improperly disclosed details regarding a panel blowout incident on an Alaska Airlines flight.

news.headline: Online retailer in Mountain View, California deploys 4 Knightscope K1 Hemispheres for security.
news.summary: A company based in Mountain View, California has recently installed four Knightscope K1 Hemispheres, cutting-edge security robots. These robots are being deployed by an online retailer for security purposes. Knightscope K1 Hemispheres are known for their advanced security features and are being increasingly utilized in various industries.

news.headline: Ethereum trader predicts 77% chance of ETF launch, expects significant upside repricing, goes 'extremely long' on asset. Market sentiment remains bearish.
news.summary: The anticipation surrounding Spot Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) ETFs has created a buzz in the crypto community, with traders eagerly awaiting the potential impact on the market. Trader Flood Capital has put the likelihood of the Ethereum ETF starting trading next week at an impressive 77%, leading to a spike in positive sentiment towards the second-largest cryptocurrency. Flood Capital has taken a confident stance by going "extremely long" on Ethereum, expecting a notable increase in value. Despite concerns about lower Ethereum prices following the ETF announcement pump, there are worries about outflows from OTC trading of ETHE and negative remarks from prominent figures like Kang dampening market sentiment. Flood Capital has pointed out bullish arguments that are often overlooked, suggesting that asset managers see the crypto ETF in a positive light.

news.headline: BlueHalo chosen by U.S. Army for Next Gen C-UAS Missile dev. 1 of 2 vendors selected by CCDC AvMC AMTC.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on June 27, 2024, the U.S. Army Combat Capabilities Development Command Aviation & Missile Center (CCDC AvMC) Aviation & Missile Technology Consortium® (AMTC) has chosen BlueHalo along with another vendor to advance in the development process.

news.headline: Atlantic Ultraviolet Corp introduces new Megatron models with updated features, including touchscreen interface and integration with building management systems. The first Megatron model, M250, was developed in 1990. Mark Wyckoff was hired for the project.
news.summary: In June 27, 2024, Hauppauge, New York, Atlantic Ultraviolet Corporation® introduced the inaugural Megatron® model, known as M250, in 1990 specifically designed to cater to the substantial UV water disinfection requirements within industrial and municipal settings. Engineer Mark Wyckoff was appointed to spearhead the project. Following the success of the M250, subsequent models such as M50 and M90 were also developed.

news.headline: With Ethereum phishing becoming more challenging, scammers shift focus to TON and Bitcoin amid rising interest in Telegram’s blockchain.
news.summary: The Telegram Open Network (TON) has emerged as one of the most prominent blockchains this summer, garnering significant attention from cryptocurrency enthusiasts.

news.headline: SoundHound AI converts all series A preferred stock to class A common stock, after raising preferred equity in Jan 2023.
news.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc., a prominent voice artificial intelligence company based in Santa Clara, California, revealed that all current series A preferred shares will convert to class A common stock. This decision comes following the company's successful preferred equity funding round in January 2023, where various financial and strategic investors participated. Notably, SoundHound possessed the authority, as per the series A preferred terms, to mandate an automatic conversion of all investor shares.

news.headline: Coinbase files lawsuit against SEC and FDIC over FOIA noncompliance concerning Ethereum's PoS transition.
news.summary: Legal actions have been taken by Coinbase against the SEC and FDIC, accusing them of failing to comply with FOIA requests related to Ethereum's transition to proof of stake (PoS). The lawsuits target the two agencies for alleged non-compliance with a significant number of requests for information regarding this transition.

news.headline: Puffer Finance raises $18M, shifts to base rollups, bridging Ethereum layer-solutions' liquidity gaps.
news.summary: Currently, the protocol is dedicated to filling the liquidity voids between various Ethereum layer-solutions.

news.headline: Crypto thefts spiked by 113% in Q2 2024, hitting $572M. Huge losses seen from scams and hacks, affecting central exchanges.
news.summary: In the second quarter, there was a significant increase in losses from scams and exploits compared to the previous period, with centralized exchanges losing millions of dollars. This marks a reversal from the downtrend seen earlier.

news.headline: Layer-2 rollup teams for Linea, zkSync, Arbitrum, and Optimism predict full decentralization in a few years.
news.summary: Teams for various layer-2 rollup solutions, such as Linea, zkSync, Arbitrum, and Optimism, have announced plans for achieving complete decentralization in the near future.

news.headline: AI in corporations may threaten Web3 and decentralization, according to experts.
New MiCA laws in Europe bring changes for crypto industry, impacting stablecoins & providers. EU's regulation in effect now.
news.summary: New regulations introduced by the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) will impact the cryptocurrency sector. These rules specifically target stablecoins and providers of crypto asset services. The new regulations are set to bring significant changes to the industry and will have a widespread effect on how stablecoins are used and managed. Financial companies and crypto service providers will need to adhere to these rules, marking a significant shift in the regulatory landscape for the cryptocurrency market in the EU.

news.headline: Freddie Mac's 2023 Sustainability Report released, includes SASB and TCFD indices for 2021-2023. #FMCC #sustainability
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, VA, released its annual Sustainability Report on June 27, 2024. The report highlights the company's sustainability initiatives, strategies, and accomplishments in 2023. It includes information on the Sustainability Accounting Standards Board (SASB) Index and Metrics for 2021-2023 along with a Taskforce on Climate-Related Financial Disclosures (TCFD) Index. Freddie Mac, trading as OTCQB: FMCC, aims to enhance transparency and accountability by providing insights into its sustainability practices.

news.headline: Fed's Bowman warns of raising interest rates if inflation stalls; total PCE inflation at 2.7%, core at 2.8% in April. Core CPI inflation down to 3.4% in May, with YTD average at 3.8%.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman recently expressed hesitation in decreasing the policy rate, emphasizing a willingness to support potential rate hikes if inflation indicators worsen. Speaking in London, Bowman highlighted only slight progress in inflation throughout 2024. She cautioned that persistent labor market tightness and heightened immigration levels could maintain elevated core services inflation. As of April, the 12-month average for total and core Personal Consumption Expenditure (PCE) inflation stood at 2.7 percent and 2.8 percent, respectively. The May consumer price index (CPI) report showed a decline in 12-month core CPI inflation to 3.4 percent from April's 3.6 percent. Despite this, the average core CPI inflation for the year through May reached 3.8 percent, surpassing the latter half of last year.

news.headline: LangChain releases self-improving evaluators for LLM-as-a-Judge to enhance AI alignment with human preferences, using few-shot learning & user feedback.
news.summary: LangChain has unveiled innovative self-enhancing evaluators for LLM-as-a-Judge, striving to harmonize AI results with human inclinations by utilizing few-shot learning and user feedback. This advancement promises to revolutionize the alignment of artificial intelligence with human preferences.

news.headline: Sila raises $375M for Titan Silicon™ for Auto Production, led by Sutter Hill & T. Rowe Price Associates.
news.summary: A company based in Alameda, California, called Sila, specializing in next-generation battery materials, has successfully secured $375 million in funding during the close of its Series G round. The funding was led by current investors Sutter Hill Ventures and funds and accounts advised by T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc. along with new outside investors and existing investors such as Bessemer Venture Partners, Coatue, Perry Creek Capital, and others. The funds will be allocated towards completing Sila's Moses Lake plant by the first quarter of 2025, enabling the company to achieve its strategic objectives.

news.headline: VanEck, pioneer in the US, files for Solana ETF as per company's digital assets research head; first in the nation.
news.summary: VanEck, a leading company in the United States, has become the first in the country to submit a filing for a Solana Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). As per VanEck's head of digital assets research, this groundbreaking move signals the growing interest in Solana within the investment community. This ETF filing by VanEck highlights the increasing popularity of Solana as a digital asset, demonstrating a shift towards alternative cryptocurrencies. This move comes at a time when Solana's market presence is steadily rising, with its value and market cap seeing significant growth, indicating investor confidence in the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Foundation grants $10K scholarships to 65+ Florida females, providing them with a unique prom experience. Tampa charity makes a difference.
news.summary: In Tampa Bay, Florida on June 27, 2024, numerous students have concluded their school year and are transitioning into summer with varying emotions. However, a significant number of girls in the Tampa Bay area are rejoicing over the recent life-changing support they received from a community organization. "My Fairy...

news.headline: Lanvin Group appoints Peter Copping as Artistic Director of Lanvin, the oldest French couture house.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Lanvin Group revealed the appointment of Peter Copping as the Artistic Director of Lanvin, the oldest active couture house in France and a key brand under Lanvin Group's umbrella. Lanvin Group, a prominent luxury fashion conglomerate traded on the NYSE under the symbol LANV, disclosed this significant move today. Peter Copping's new role marks a pivotal moment for the renowned fashion house as it looks to leverage his expertise and creativity in shaping its future direction.

news.headline: Transportation Insight and Nolan Transportation Group open new headquarters in Atlanta, GA at Campus 244.
news.summary: In Atlanta on June 27, 2024, Transportation Insight (TI) and Nolan Transportation Group (NTG) revealed the launch of their new headquarters in Atlanta, Georgia. Located at Campus 244, this cutting-edge facility will act as the central hub for the companies' operations.

news.headline: Cineverse partners with 9 Story to launch 'Garfield and Friends' on Sling Freestream. LOS ANGELES, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on June 27, 2024, Cineverse Corp. (NASDAQ: CNVS) revealed that the 9 Story Presents: Garfield and Friends channel is now accessible on Sling Freestream. This channel, featuring beloved characters from the iconic Garfield franchise, is now available to stream on the popular platform.

news.headline: Cobalt Service Partners acquires Digi Security Systems, its 7th acquisition since launch; Digi founded in 2003 by Joshua Herron.
news.summary: In New York, commercial access solutions platform Cobalt Service Partners, supported by Alpine Investors, disclosed their acquisition of leading commercial security integrator Digi Security Systems. This marks Cobalt's seventh acquisition since its establishment in December 2023. The company Digi was established in Tulsa, Oklahoma in 2003 by its President Joshua Herron, who originally worked as a software developer at RAE Corporation.

news.headline: Stratus Materials reaches key milestone for LXMOTM Li-ion Battery Cathode Active Material in Pittsburgh.
news.summary: Stratus Materials of Pittsburgh has reached a significant milestone in the performance of its LXMOTM lithium-ion battery cathode active material.

news.headline: Princess Cruises introduces "Better than Best Price Guarantee" on 2025 & 2026 cruises, ensuring best prices for early bookers.
news.summary: Smart shoppers now have the opportunity to book their 2025 or 2026 cruise vacation with complete confidence, thanks to The Line's latest offering - the "Better than Best Price Guarantee." This guarantee ensures that customers lock in the lowest price available for their cruise. The initiative was announced in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on June 27, 2024. This new policy provides assurance to savvy shoppers that they are getting the most competitive deal possible.
